API Reference

Functions

MyDocumentedPackage.add — Method
add(a::Number, b::Number)

Add two numbers together.

Arguments

  • a::Number: First number
  • b::Number: Second number

Returns

The sum of a and b

Examples

julia> add(2, 3)
5
MyDocumentedPackage.hello — Method
hello(name::String)

Greet someone by name.

Arguments

  • name::String: The person's name

Returns

A greeting string

Examples

julia> hello("World")
"Hello, World!"

Summary

hello

hello(name::String)

Returns a greeting message for the given name.

add

add(a::Number, b::Number)

Adds two numbers together and returns the sum.
